stemHtml: Approach procedures - Circling. The visual contact with the runway is lost on the down-wind leg, while circling to land following an instrument approach. You have to initiate a go-around.

options.a: Make an initial climbing turn towards the runway and initiate the missed approach.
options.b: Make a turn of 90 degrees towards the runway and try to regain visual contact.
options.c: Turn towards the runway, maintain altitude and request ATC instructions.
options.d: If you have other visual cues of the aerodrome environment, continue with visual ground contact.
